sql:
SELECT RF_PLI_037_CarteraBBC_CLP.Fec_Pro, RF_PLI_037_CarteraBBC_CLP.Cod_Emp, RF_PLI_037_CarteraBBC_CLP.Moneda, RF_PLI_037_CarteraBBC_CLP.Cod_Pro, RF_PLI_037_CarteraBBC_CLP.Cod_Sub_Pro, RF_PLI_037_CarteraBBC_CLP.Nemotecnico, RF_PLI_037_CarteraBBC_CLP.Instrumento, RF_PLI_037_CarteraBBC_CLP.VP_Cap_Amort, RF_PLI_037_CarteraBBC_CLP.VP_Int_Total, RF_PLI_037_CarteraBBC_CLP.Dias_Vcto, (RF_PLI_037_CarteraBBC_CLP.VP_Cap_Amort+RF_PLI_037_CarteraBBC_CLP.VP_Int_Total)/RF_PLI_038_CarteraBBC_CLP_MonTotal.VP_Flujo AS Ponderador INTO RF_CarteraBBC_Pond
FROM RF_PLI_037_CarteraBBC_CLP INNER JOIN RF_PLI_038_CarteraBBC_CLP_MonTotal ON (RF_PLI_037_CarteraBBC_CLP.Cod_Pro = RF_PLI_038_CarteraBBC_CLP_MonTotal.Cod_Pro) AND (RF_PLI_037_CarteraBBC_CLP.Moneda = RF_PLI_038_CarteraBBC_CLP_MonTotal.Moneda);
